summary: Iteration_5 live-Supabase end-to-end test. Staff auth + sidebar role gating + admin page rendering all PASS. CRITICAL: the `fix_student_rpcs_v2.sql` SQL patch is NOT YET APPLIED — the `test_attempt_questions` join table is empty (0 rows), and `get_student_attempt` returns `questions: []` for freshly created attempts, so the student test-taking screen will show 'Question 1 of 0' exactly as described in the bug. Also uncovered two new high-priority issues: (a) only 1 of 8 tests is published — Algebra 1A/1B/2A/2B, Chemistry 1/2, Biology 2 are all `is_published=false` (only Biology 1 is published), so the test selector for student 100001's Algebra 1A path has nothing to click; (b) `teacher@hpa.test` sees 0 rows in `teacher_class_assignments` via RLS even though the super admin sees 1,020 rows, which makes the Admin Sections page render 'No sections to show' for both teacher and campus-admin accounts. Seed data has also drifted from the credentials file: student IDs now begin at 103170 (not 100001); Madison campus-admin profile is 'Marcus Cole' not the expected Madison admin name — UI + RLS still work but the credentials file should be refreshed. No answer-key leakage detected in `get_student_attempt`.

critical.issue: RPC creates a test_attempts row with question_order[], but DOES NOT insert into test_attempt_questions. Verified via curl: after calling start_or_get_attempt for student 34df0f1f... on Biology 1, `select count(*) from test_attempt_questions where attempt_id=...` returns 0. Consequence: get_student_attempt returns `questions:[]` and the student-test UI shows 'Question 1 of 0'. Fix exists at /app/supabase/fix_student_rpcs_v2.sql but has NOT been applied to the live DB.
Returns {test, attempt, questions:[], responses:[]} for a just-created attempt — directly blocks the student test-taking flow. Root cause is start_or_get_attempt (above).

As teacher@hpa.test, count is 0/0; as super@hpa.test, count is 1020. The teacher's RLS policy is either filtering on a teacher_id that no longer matches the seeded profile, or the profile row for teacher@hpa.test is not linked to any teacher in the teachers table. This cascades to Admin Sections showing 'No sections to show' for teacher and for madison campus-admin.

minor.issue: Only 1 of 8 seeded tests is published (`is_published=true` only for Biology 1). Algebra 1A, Algebra 1B, Algebra 2A, Algebra 2B, Biology 2, Chemistry 1, Chemistry 2 all have is_published=false and no boc_opens_at/eoc_opens_at windows set. Per the review request the Liam Garcia / Algebra 1A end-to-end path is therefore untestable in live mode until someone publishes the test and sets a window.

Column `phase` does not exist (PGRST 42703). The frontend StudentTestSelector.jsx line 69 reads `t.phase || t.test_type` — fine as a fallback, but every test currently has `test_type=null` too, so phase is always null. Admin Tests EditTestDialog needs to set test_type (or a proper phase column) on insert/update.
Works with real seeded IDs (e.g. 103170) but returns {found:false} for the ID 100001 that `/app/memory/test_credentials.md` still references — credentials file is stale.

integration_issues.issue: Both teacher@hpa.test and madison@hpa.test see 'No sections to show' (0 of 0). Super admin sees the page correctly. Root cause is the RLS/profile mapping on teacher_class_assignments noted above, not the frontend component.

End-to-end takes the student to a test-taking page that will render 'Question 1 of 0' because test_attempt_questions is never populated. Could not proceed past the selector in a meaningful way for Algebra 1A because that test is unpublished.

issues: Branding has been renamed from 'HPA' to 'Highland Prep' across nav/header/footer — cosmetic only; flagging for E1 in case the PRD still says HPA.

action_items: BLOCKING: apply /app/supabase/fix_student_rpcs_v2.sql to the live Supabase project — verify afterwards that `select count(*) from test_attempt_questions` becomes > 0 after a fresh start_or_get_attempt call, and that get_student_attempt returns a non-empty `questions` array.
Publish at least Algebra 1A (and set boc_opens_at/boc_closes_at so it shows in the student test selector) — otherwise the review request's Liam Garcia → Algebra 1A end-to-end path remains untestable.

Fix teacher RLS on teacher_class_assignments: teacher@hpa.test currently sees 0 rows even though 1020 exist; the profile → teachers mapping or the caller-scope helper (my_teacher_id()) is almost certainly returning null for that auth.uid(). Same impact for madison campus_admin.
Refresh /app/memory/test_credentials.md: student IDs now start at 103170 (was 100001), and the Madison campus admin profile name is 'Marcus Cole' not the documented Madison admin.

On the Admin Tests create/edit dialog, make sure `test_type` (or the new `phase` column if it's meant to be added) is actually written — all 8 existing tests have test_type=null which breaks the BOC/EOC filter logic on the student side.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js getStudentAttempt and findOrCreateAttempt line up with the DB signature hint (p_section_id, p_student_db_id, p_test_id and p_attempt_id, p_student_db_id, p_session_secret) — no frontend change needed once the SQL fix lands.
Answer-key security verified: curl response for get_student_attempt does NOT contain the string 'correct_answer' anywhere. Good.
Role-based sidebar gating in AppShell.jsx is correct: campus_admin hides Integrations/Settings/Campuses; teacher hides Campuses/Users/Integrations/Settings/Tests. Matches the review request.
Route protection: visiting /admin/integrations as madison campus_admin is correctly redirected to /admin/dashboard.

success_rate.backend: ~60% — SECURITY DEFINER RPCs exist and respond, but start_or_get_attempt does not populate TAQ; teacher RLS over-scopes
success_rate.frontend: ~75% — app boots, staff/student login works, admin pages render for super, role gating is correct; sections pages empty for teacher/campus_admin; student test flow blocked by RPC bug

test_credentials: Verified: super@hpa.test, madison@hpa.test, teacher@hpa.test all log in with HPATestUser123. Student 103170 (Logen Salas) verified via UI flow through to course picker. Student 100001 no longer exists in live seed.
seed_data_creation: A single test attempt (id fe42e379-bc13-48fa-a9ef-9dad2fce886d) was created via curl for student 34df0f1f-d395-4f90-a28f-955f73afc7ca on Biology 1 (test c3bdbef0-66e9-4e38-9b7b-0819910caab4) to reproduce the TAQ-empty bug. It can be deleted by the main agent with `delete from test_attempts where id = 'fe42e379-bc13-48fa-a9ef-9dad2fce886d'` before the next run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The ONE blocking fix is applying /app/supabase/fix_student_rpcs_v2.sql. After the user runs it, the next testing agent should (1) curl start_or_get_attempt for a valid student+section+published-test combo, (2) confirm test_attempt_questions count jumps to the expected question_count, (3) curl get_student_attempt and verify questions.length equals question_count, (4) then drive the full Playwright student flow from / → ID → course picker → teacher verify → test selector → test page and check the progress counter reads 'Question 1 of N' where N>0 → submit. Second-priority item: fix teacher_class_assignments RLS so teacher@hpa.test sees non-zero rows; this will unblock the Admin Sections drill-down test. Third: publish Algebra 1A (with boc/eoc windows) so the memory-file'd Liam Garcia path actually exercises a live test.
rca of the issue: Root cause of 'Question 1 of 0': the live start_or_get_attempt RPC writes a test_attempts row with a question_order uuid[] but never does INSERT INTO test_attempt_questions (attempt_id, question_id, position) ... for each question in the order. Subsequent get_student_attempt joins questions via test_attempt_questions and therefore returns an empty array. Proof: super_admin count on test_attempt_questions returned 0/0 across the whole project even after starting a fresh attempt. Mitigation: apply /app/supabase/fix_student_rpcs_v2.sql which (per the review note) adds the missing INSERT. Secondary RCA on teacher RLS: my_teacher_id() helper likely returns null for the teacher@hpa.test auth.uid() either because the profiles.teacher_id column is missing or the teachers row for 'Alicia Reyes' is not linked to the staff profile. Mitigation: verify `select id, role, teacher_id from public.profiles where email='teacher@hpa.test'` returns a non-null teacher_id matching a row in public.teachers.
